omitted_declarations.policy_reference:
13.2.1 Category
Identifiers
Source
Directly from consumers when interacting with our services
Disclose(d) to
Vendors, service providers and other third parties
Sold to
Third parties helping with retargeting advertising to you

2.1.3 We process pseudonymized information about how
you behave on our app. This includes server log files, IP
addresses, and user IDs, some of which are assigned by or
provided to third-party providers.

9.7 Payment provider
Reason for the disclosure: To process payments, we share your data with
payment providers and banks that process your data as data controllers and
processors.

13.2.3 Category
Internet or other similar network activity information
Source
Directly from consumers when interacting with our services
Disclose(d) to
Vendors, service providers and other third parties
Sold to
Third parties helping with retargeting advertising to you
